_comment: Visual traits per species, grounded in standard transformer paper visualization conventions. AT UIL roles map to our structured data species. Colors follow the academic consensus: attention=warm amber, FFN/activation=electric blue, residual/norm=neutral gray, embedding=cool teal, output=soft green.

cil-eye._role: Attention (Self-Attn) — corresponds to AT UIL 'Query/Key/Value' visualization

internal_structure.description: 8 radial attention head rays, mimicking multi-head attention diagrams

cil-bolt._role: FFN / Activation — corresponds to AT UIL 'MLP' block

internal_structure.description: 2 dense layer zigzags (W1, W2) matching standard FFN two-layer diagram

cil-vector._role: Embedding / Positional Encoding — corresponds to AT UIL 'Token Embedding + PE' row

internal_structure.description: 4 parallel magnitude-weighted arrows, referencing embedding dimension heatmap

cil-plus._role: Add & Norm — corresponds to AT UIL 'Residual + LayerNorm' junction

internal_structure.description: 2 orthogonal bars (add + norm), matching residual connection junction symbol

cil-arrow-right._role: Output / Dataflow — corresponds to AT UIL 'Softmax + Linear' output head

internal_structure.description: 1 directed flow arrow, matching output probability flow in paper diagrams

cil-filter._role: Gating / Masking — corresponds to AT UIL 'Mask' or 'Gate' operator

internal_structure.description: 3 horizontal filter bars, referencing attention mask grid diagrams

cil-code._role: Tokenizer / Vocab — corresponds to AT UIL 'Token ID' structured input

internal_structure.description: 5 token bracket slots, referencing tokenization sequence diagrams

cil-layers._role: Stacked Layers / Depth — corresponds to AT UIL 'N×' repeat block

internal_structure.description: 6 stacked horizontal planes, referencing the N-layer repeat box convention

cil-loop._role: Recurrence / PubSub Loop — corresponds to AT UIL 'Decoder cross-attn' feedback

internal_structure.description: 3 circular arcs forming feedback loop, matching decoder recurrence diagrams

cil-graph._role: Graph / Topology — corresponds to AT UIL 'Sparse Attention' or graph-attn pattern

internal_structure.description: 5 nodes with edges, referencing sparse attention connectivity diagrams
